verses.text: You are a holy people; cut not yourselves for the dead. Holy. God's people mourn differently.
You are a holy people; cut not yourselves for the dead. Holy. God's people mourn differently.
Eat clean beasts only, not what is abominable. Clean. God marks their food.
Eat clean beasts only, not what is abominable. Clean. God marks their food.
Eat clean beasts only, not what is abominable. Clean. God marks their food.
Clean beasts part the hoof and chew the cud; the swine is unclean. The mark. Two signs show what is clean.
Clean beasts part the hoof and chew the cud; the swine is unclean. The mark. Two signs show what is clean.
Clean beasts part the hoof and chew the cud; the swine is unclean. The mark. Two signs show what is clean.
Eat fish with fins and scales. Clean fish. The waters too are bounded.
Eat fish with fins and scales. Clean fish. The waters too are bounded.
Eat clean birds, not the unclean; flying creeping things are unclean. Clean birds. The list guides their table.
Eat clean birds, not the unclean; flying creeping things are unclean. Clean birds. The list guides their table.
Eat clean birds, not the unclean; flying creeping things are unclean. Clean birds. The list guides their table.

Eat clean birds, not the unclean; flying creeping things are unclean. Clean birds. The list guides their table.
Eat clean birds, not the unclean; flying creeping things are unclean. Clean birds. The list guides their table.
Eat nothing that dies of itself; seethe not a kid in his mother's milk. Holy. Even food shows reverence.
Tithe your increase and eat before the LORD. Tithe. Give God His portion.
Tithe your increase and eat before the LORD. Tithe. Give God His portion.
If the way is long, turn it to money and rejoice there. Provision. God makes worship possible.
If the way is long, turn it to money and rejoice there. Provision. God makes worship possible.
If the way is long, turn it to money and rejoice there. Provision. God makes worship possible.
Forsake not the Levite; the third-year tithe feeds the poor. Share. The poor and Levite are fed.
